run_summary.summary: One new outbound pitch to log! 🤝 Liz sent TWO pitches today for the backyard firepit project — the Black Diamond Coatings one was already captured, but she also pitched Shabebe LLC (Rock Glue + hardscape products) to Wenna at wenna@shabebellc.com about an hour later. Created that card so you can track both pitches side by side. Also adding a JLab payment detail: Liz confirmed ACH with Cheyenne at JLab today and invoices should go to apinvoice@jlab.com — flagging in case the specific contact name and invoice email weren't in previous notes.

suggestions.message: Liz pitched Wenna at Shabebe LLC for the same firepit patio project as Black Diamond Coatings — featuring their Rock Glue + hardscape products. Interesting to see two brands approached for the same project! If both respond, you'll want to decide which (or both?) to move forward with. If no reply by Thursday, a quick follow-up would be timely 🔥
JLab payment detail to save: Liz confirmed ACH with Cheyenne at JLab today. Invoices go to apinvoice@jlab.com (PDF, JPG, or PNG format only). If the invoice hasn't been sent yet, that's your address!

deals.next_action: Wait for Wenna at Shabebe to respond to pitch
deals.notes: [Apr 27]: Liz sent outbound pitch to Wenna (wenna@shabebellc.com) at Shabebe LLC. Pitching backyard firepit patio makeover collab — raised paver patio with pea gravel, designated fire pit + Adirondack chair space. Wants to feature Shabebe's Rock Glue and other hardscape products as the clean, low-maintenance solution. Media kit attached, Kenny cc'd. No rate or deliverables discussed yet.
deals.activity_note: Apr 27: Liz sent outbound pitch for backyard firepit patio project featuring Rock Glue + hardscape products. Awaiting response.

deals.notes: [Apr 27]: Liz confirmed ACH payment method with Cheyenne at JLab (Liz: 'ACH would be great, but either works'). JLab invoice email: apinvoice@jlab.com (PDF, JPG, or PNG format only). Payment portal: suppliers.tipalti.com/jlab.
